responsible_ai_notes: This analysis is based on transactional patterns, cashier observations, and payment methods. While confidence scores are provided, these are risk indicators and not definitive proof of illegal activity. Recommendations should be implemented with consideration for: (1) Customer privacy rights - individuals may have legitimate reasons for purchasing multiple items; (2) Bias mitigation - physical descriptions or behavioral patterns should not lead to profiling; (3) Due process - suspected fraud should be investigated through proper channels before any punitive action; (4) Gift card legitimacy - cards may have been purchased legally even if used for reselling purposes; (5) Geographic correlation may be coincidental. All flagged transactions should undergo human review before final action. Store policies should be applied consistently to all customers regardless of appearance or perceived intent. If gift cards are suspected to be fraudulent (obtained through scams/theft), coordinate with law enforcement. If reselling is the primary concern, implement fair purchase limits that apply to all customers.
